full_video_sequence_variations.purpose: Alternative complete movement structures for Grok image-to-video fashion generation using a base image.

variations.name: Aproximar e tocar
variations.best_for: General clothing presentation, especially dresses, tops, sets and fitted outfits.

timeline.action: The subject starts neutral, gently shifts her weight and makes calm eye contact with the camera.
She takes two small natural steps forward. Her shoulders stay relaxed and her arms move naturally.
One hand lightly touches the existing upper-front fabric area of the outfit, as if showing texture or fit. The touch is brief and delicate.
She releases the fabric and returns to a neutral expression. One hand naturally rests on the waist.
She makes a small torso rotation to one side, showing the fit of the outfit without posing aggressively.
She gives a short, soft smile, then lets it fade naturally while returning to a relaxed neutral stance.

variations.expression_behavior: Neutral first, brief soft smile during fabric touch, neutral again, then one final short smile.

variations.name: Ajustar cabelo e mostrar roupa
variations.best_for: More feminine and natural lifestyle-style fashion videos.

timeline.action: The subject casually brushes her hair backward near the side of the head. The gesture is quick, soft and realistic.
Her hand returns naturally to a relaxed position. Her expression remains neutral, not smiling constantly.
She takes one small step forward and subtly adjusts her posture to show the outfit better.
She lightly smooths an existing fabric area of the outfit, without changing the garment shape.
She gently shifts her hips side to side in a very subtle way while keeping one hand near the waist.
She turns her head slightly to one side, gives a short warm smile, then returns to neutral.

variations.expression_behavior: Neutral during hair adjustment, faint smile during outfit smoothing, then relaxed neutral with a brief final smile.

variations.name: Mostrar o caimento
variations.best_for: Outfits where the fit, body shape, waistline or overall silhouette matters.

timeline.action: The subject begins facing the camera with a calm neutral expression.
She gently rotates her torso a few degrees to one side, enough to show the outfit silhouette.
One hand naturally rests on the waist while the other remains relaxed.
She returns slightly toward the camera and takes one small step forward.
She lightly touches or smooths the existing side/front fabric area, preserving the original clothing design.
She makes a very subtle hip shift and natural posture adjustment.
She looks back at the camera with a brief soft smile, then relaxes her face naturally.

variations.expression_behavior: Calm and neutral for most of the video, with only one brief soft smile near the end.

variations.name: Mostrar a textura
variations.best_for: Clothing with visible fabric texture, ribbed material, soft fabric, lace already existing in the original image, knitwear or detailed material.

timeline.action: The subject starts relaxed and briefly glances down toward the outfit.
One hand rises naturally and lightly touches the existing fabric texture.
Her fingers softly move across a very small area of the fabric, as if showing the material. The touch must be delicate.
She releases the fabric and looks back at the camera.
She takes one small step back and naturally places one hand near the waist.
She performs a slight torso rotation so the fabric catches light naturally.
Her expression softens briefly into a small smile, then returns to neutral.

variations.expression_behavior: Neutral while looking at the fabric, brief soft smile after showing the material, then neutral again.

variations.name: Agir naturalmente
variations.best_for: Making AI-generated women look more human and less staged.

timeline.action: The subject starts slightly idle, as if she was not perfectly posed. She breathes naturally and shifts weight subtly.
She notices the camera naturally and adjusts her posture slightly.
She gives a tiny soft smile, then lets it fade.
She steps forward once and lightly touches the existing outfit fabric.
She releases the fabric and rests one hand naturally on the waist.
She makes a small side-to-side body movement, very subtle and casual.
She looks slightly to one side, then back toward the camera, ending naturally without freezing.

variations.expression_behavior: Human and inconsistent in a realistic way: neutral, faint smile, neutral, slight attention shift.
